queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the mitigating impact of having no checking account on credit risk drivers and default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default analysis regarding the risk reduction associated with a negative checking account balance as a credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into how a critical credit history or the presence of other existing credits contributes to increased credit risk and default likelihood.
